header.title: Tactics — Situational Play
header.description: Position each player based on where the ball is across the 35 quadrants of the pitch. Saved per formation.

help.corner: Layout used on any corner. The engine mirrors X by the side of the field automatically.
help.throw_in: Layout used on any throw-in. The engine mirrors X by the side the ball went out.
help.free_kick: Layout used on any free kick. The engine adjusts to where the ball is.
help.goal_kick: Layout used on goal kicks. Place attackers where you want to win the launch.

set_piece.explanation: <0>How it works:</0> the engine uses this layout on any restart of the selected type. For corners and throw-ins, X is automatically mirrored based on the side. The keeper stays inside the small area. If you don't customize, the engine falls back to the default behavior (situational + knobs).

viz.ghost_hint: Enable "Opposite phase" to see the ghost

explanation: <0>Dynamic (default):</0> the whole team follows the ball — vertically more, laterally less. When you drag a player, the quadrant becomes <1>customized</1> (yellow dot in the corner) and locks into that shape.

preset.editing_banner: Editing preset "{{name}}" (base {{base}}). Save updates this preset.

dialog.create_description: Creates a preset from the current setup ({{count}}/{{limit}} used). Base: {{formation}}.
dialog.duplicate_description: Clones "{{name}}" with a new name. Later edits stay isolated.
dialog.delete_description: Delete "{{name}}"? Lineups using this preset fall back to the base formation default.
dialog.share_description: Sends a copy of "{{name}}" to another club. The other club gets notified.

error.limit_reached: Preset limit (10) reached. Delete one to create another.
error.target_limit_reached: Target club already has 10 presets. They need to delete one first.
error.name_taken: A preset with that name already exists.
error.same_club: Can't share a preset with your own club.

duplicate_dialog.title: Duplicate adjustments
duplicate_dialog.description: Copies only the <0>customized</0> quadrants from <1>{{formation}}</1> to the chosen formation, slot by slot (non-customized ones keep the dynamic default in the new formation). Saves straight to the database.

toast.all_cleared: All customizations cleared — don't forget to save
